page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sccc7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. There are no integrated GPU accelerators on this instance type.

Network connectivity is supported by a 64 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This high-throughput network interface, combined with the dense dedicated compute cores, makes the instance suitable for highly parallelized, compute-bound workloads. These workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive scientific simulations, and large-scale compilation tasks where high CPU density and dedicated core execution are critical.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sccc7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance designed for high-density CPU workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors on the x86_64 architecture. The instance operates with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel compute tasks, batch processing, and scientific simulations requiring high-throughput networking and dedicated CPU execution.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sccc7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B cores, 256 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth for high-performance parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density compute instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated physical cores and sixty-four gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.
